g.text: Tigris direct: near-linear 1-8 workers, GPU-bound plateau at 16 workers, ~134 samples/sec

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: TAG warm cache: GPU saturates at just 4 workers — 4x fewer workers needed

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Both lines plateau near identical peak throughput — NVMe latency hides S3 TTFB

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Tigris within 3% of AWS S3 baseline at saturation (AWS reported ~138 samples/sec)
